acceptance_criteria: Prove list-compilation composition for compileStmts by structural induction.
Strengthen append theorem so it can be instantiated from any initial CompileState.
Add a non-trivial semantic-preservation theorem artifact for a supported compilation subset without weakening obligations.
Extend semantic-preservation coverage to the supported letVar/assignVar/setStorage(localVar) subset with explicit field-resolution assumptions.
Extend semantic-preservation coverage to an arithmetic subset where assignVar rebinding uses add(localVar,tmpLiteral) before setStorage.

theorems.name: compileStmts_append
theorems.statement_summary: Compiling pre ++ post is equivalent to sequentially compiling pre then post.

theorems.name: compileStmts_append_from
theorems.statement_summary: The append-composition theorem holds when run from any initial CompileState.

theorems.name: compileStmts_single_setStorage_literal_run
theorems.statement_summary: Single-statement compilation for setStorage literal emits the expected typed setStorage write under explicit field-resolution assumptions.

theorems.name: compile_setStorage_literal_semantics
theorems.statement_summary: For the supported setStorage-literal subset, compiled typed-IR execution matches direct source-level storage update semantics.

theorems.name: compileStmts_let_literal_setStorage_local_run
theorems.statement_summary: Two-statement compilation for letVar-literal followed by setStorage-localVar emits the expected SSA let and typed setStorage sequence from empty compile state.

theorems.name: compile_let_setStorage_local_literal_semantics
theorems.statement_summary: For the supported letVar/setStorage-local subset, compiled typed-IR execution preserves source storage-update semantics and records the expected SSA variable binding effect.

theorems.name: compileStmts_let_assign_literal_setStorage_local_run
theorems.statement_summary: Three-statement compilation for letVar-literal; assignVar-literal; setStorage-localVar emits the expected two SSA lets and typed setStorage sequence from empty compile state.

theorems.name: compile_let_assign_setStorage_local_literal_semantics
theorems.statement_summary: For the supported letVar/assignVar/setStorage-local subset, compiled typed-IR execution preserves source storage-update semantics and records the expected SSA rebinding sequence.

theorems.name: compileStmts_let_assign_add_literal_setStorage_local_run
theorems.statement_summary: Three-statement compilation for letVar-literal; assignVar-add(localVar,literal); setStorage-localVar emits the expected SSA let rebinding with typed addition and typed setStorage sequence from empty compile state.

theorems.name: compile_let_assign_add_setStorage_local_literal_semantics
theorems.statement_summary: For the supported arithmetic letVar/assignVar-add/setStorage-local subset, compiled typed-IR execution preserves source storage-update semantics (n + m) and the expected SSA rebinding effect.

tests: TypedIRTests: example instantiating compileStmts_append_from over arbitrary fields/pre/post/state
TypedIRTests: example instantiating compile_setStorage_literal_semantics over arbitrary fields/fieldName/slot assumptions
TypedIRTests: example instantiating compile_let_setStorage_local_literal_semantics over arbitrary fields/fieldName/tmp/slot assumptions
TypedIRTests: example instantiating compile_let_assign_setStorage_local_literal_semantics over arbitrary fields/fieldName/tmp/slot assumptions
TypedIRTests: example instantiating compile_let_assign_add_setStorage_local_literal_semantics over arbitrary fields/fieldName/tmp/slot assumptions

2.2.notes: 2.2 remains partial: this slice extends semantic-preservation evidence to a broader arithmetic three-statement subset (letVar literal; assignVar add(localVar,literal); setStorage localVar) under explicit field-resolution assumptions, but does not yet prove full source-vs-typed semantics for the broader supported statement fragment.
